title: Include activities in "Last Updated" column
excerpt:

posts.author: Ida (Ida)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We want to easily see who has updated an item – but currently, the “Last updated” column only updates if the item data / columns are updated. We want to also be able to see updates on activities. Maybe a new column called “Last activity” is better suited for this purpose – but our initial thought would be that the “Last updated” included every update on the item.

What are you trying to achieve

We want to change the logic behind the “Last updated” column, or add a new “Last activity” column, that also takes into account when activities happens on an item.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Ida ,

If you’re open to apps, you could try Board Email Reports. It has a Last Updates automation rule that lets you get daily updates for any time period you choose.
Here’s an example:

posts.cookedHtml: Love this idea and totally agree. It would be effective in the way my team uses our Monday platform as well!
